metadata.description: Agent skills for building unhosted web applications

plugins.name: sockethub
plugins.description: Multi-protocol messaging gateway bridging web apps to IRC, XMPP, and RSS/Atom via ActivityStreams

plugins.name: remotestorage
plugins.description: Build offline-first, unhosted web apps with remoteStorage.js — user-owned data storage with automatic sync and zero backend infrastructure

plugins.name: webfinger
plugins.description: Discover user services from email-like addresses using the WebFinger protocol (RFC 7033) — remoteStorage endpoints, ActivityPub actors, profile pages, avatars, and OpenID Connect issuers
